name: io.github.mlorentedev/hive-vault
title: Hive Vault
description: On-demand Obsidian vault access for AI coding assistants — 17 tools, 5 resources, 4 prompts.

environmentVariables.name: VAULT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault (or any Markdown directory)

environmentVariables.name: HIVE_OLLAMA_ENDPOINT
environmentVariables.description: Ollama API endpoint for local worker delegation

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenRouter API key for cloud worker delegation

environmentVariables.name: HIVE_VAULT_SCOPES
environmentVariables.description: JSON mapping of scope names to vault subdirectories
